name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement for urbanflow
title: "[Feature] "
labels: T-feature
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you want.

## Problem Statement

What problem would this feature solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you would like.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Scope and Impact

- Which area(s) of the project are affected?
- Any expected impact on simulation behavior, reinforcement learning workflows, data formats, or public APIs?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, references, or mockups here.
